description: Canonical L1 semantic role set. Every value theme's tokens.css must define every `required` role — the roles that carry a theme's actual identity. `derivedOptional` roles have var()-mapped defaults declared once in foundation.css (the L1 derived defaults block); a theme overrides one only where it genuinely diverges (light/miami's paper elevation and shadows, light's bespoke sidebar). Source of truth for check-theme-contract.mjs.
